app.authFailed: ⚠ You are logged out — recent changes were NOT saved. Log in again and repeat the last edit.
app.impersonating: Player view — DM content is hidden. This is what players see.
app.loginForNew: To create a new record, please log in — with the DM or player password.
app.loginForSettings: To access settings, please log in — with the DM or player password.
app.remoteChanged: Someone else edited the data. Your in-progress changes are not lost yet.
app.saveFailed: ⚠ Saving to the server failed — check your connection and reload the page.
app.serverUnavailable: ⚠ Server is unavailable — showing default data. Changes won't be saved.
cloudmap.autoLayoutTitle: Animates nodes into mathematically ideal positions (Fruchterman–Reingold) — minimizes edge crossings and keeps the map compact
cloudmap.filterHint: More chips = AND. E.g. “alive” + “elf” → living elves.
cloudmap.filterPlaceholder: 🔍 Filter — type and Enter (status, species, tag, place…)
cloudmap.focusTitle: Clicking a node focuses its neighborhood instead of opening its detail
cloudmap.hierarchyTitle: Hierarchical layout (dagre): factions on top, command and locations below them
cloudmap.resetLayoutTitle: Clears saved positions and re-lays out the nodes automatically
cloudmap.title: Mind Palace
cloudmap.toolbarHint: Click = detail · Drag = move · Scroll = zoom
dm.hiddenContentEmpty: No record is currently marked as "DM only". You can mark it in each entity's editor.
dm.intro: Plots, session notes, encounter prep and other DM-only tools will appear here in the future. For now you'll find just an overview of what is currently hidden from players.
dm.refusal: This section is available to the DM only. Log in with the DM password at the top of the sidebar.
editform.attitudesFactionHint: — members without their own attitudes inherit these
editform.attitudesHelp: How the character relates to the party and how strongly
editform.attitudesStrengthHint: — multiple attitudes with adjustable strength (e.g. 100% neutral + 50% dangerous)
editform.circumstances: Circumstances (e.g. captured, on the run, in a coma…)
editform.circumstancesPh: Free text — the character's special situation
editform.customMap: Custom map (optional — for this location's sub-map)
editform.customMapHint: When filled in, a 🗺 Local map button appears on the location page showing its sub-locations.
editform.descHistEventPh: Detailed description of the event, causes, effects…
editform.descMysteryPh: What we know and suspect about the mystery — Markdown
editform.eventSittingHint: Session assignment and order are set by dragging the card on the Timeline.
editform.markerSizeHint: — empty = default by location type ({min}–{max} px)
editform.mysterySolvedHint: fill in the answer → the question is resolved; a solved mystery = every question has an answer
editform.onePlaceHint: A character can only ever be in one place — adding here removes them from their previous location.
editform.parentLocationHint: E.g. a dungeon inside a city. This location will appear on the parent's map.
editform.pinAfterSaveEvent: The pin can be placed after the event is first saved.
editform.pinAfterSaveLoc: The pin can be placed after the location is first saved.
editform.questionAnswerHint: fill in the answer → the question is resolved
editform.saveCharFirst: Save the character first, then add relationships.
editform.saveLocFirstChars: Save the location, then add present characters.
editform.searchAddCharacter: Search for a character and add…
editform.summaryPh: Short excerpt — one sentence or paragraph.
editform.visNoteTwin: This entity has a linked twin — unlink it in the header before changing visibility.
editmode.draftFound: Found an unfinished draft from {when}. Restore?
editmode.loginPrompt: Log in to edit (DM or player password):
editmode.passwordPrompt: This section is protected. Enter the password:
editmode.petImageAfterSave: Image can be uploaded after the first save.
editmode.twinUnlinkQ: Really unlink the twin? Both entities stay, only their link is removed.
editmode.unsavedEditorContinueQ: You have unsaved changes in the editor. Continue?
editmode.unsavedLeaveQ: You have unsaved changes. Really leave the page?
lang.appliesAfterSave: Language will apply after you save.
map.errorTextMid: or save it on the server as
map.eventPathsTitle: Show event paths and zoom to the current action
map.fileTooLarge: The file is too large to store in the browser. Try a smaller image or save it on the server as data/maps/swordcoast/sword_coast.jpg.
map.hintAddMode: Click the map to add a new place
map.hintDefault: Click = place detail · Wheel = zoom · Drag = pan
map.hintPlaceEvent: Click the map to place the event: {name}
map.noLocalMap: This place has no local map. Open its page and upload a map image.
map.removePinConfirm:
Remove “{name}” from the map?
(The place page will be kept.)
map.saveViewTitle: Save the current view as a preset
map.settingsOpt1Text: Pick a file from your computer (recommended).
map.settingsOpt2Text: Paste a direct link to the map image.
map.zoomFitAllTitle: Zoom out to the whole map
mapSheet.title: Choose Map
search.emptyHint: Start typing — or pick from recent edits…
settings.addonsIntro: Add-ons extend the app (rules, character journals…). They install from GitHub by pasting a repository link and apply only to this campaign.
settings.appearanceIntro: Color style of the whole app. The choice is saved for the entire campaign and applies to everyone connected immediately.
settings.appearanceMoreHint: More styles will be added in the future — just add a block to themes.css and an entry to the theme registry.
settings.backupIntro: The server automatically creates a backup point on every edit (coalescing changes within 60 s). It keeps the last 50 points plus one daily for 14 days.
settings.backupIntroDM: You can restore any point below or upload a whole ZIP / JSON via Restore from backup… above — a safety point is always created before overwriting.
settings.backupPlayerHint: Downloading and restoring a backup are available to the DM only. You can, however, create a manual backup point — the DM can then restore it if something goes wrong.
settings.brandingIntro: The logo appears in the sidebar, on the loading screen, and as the browser-tab icon (favicon). Upload your own image, or revert to the default dragon.
settings.bundledIconHint: game-icons.net (CC BY 3.0). Uploading your own files replaces it.
settings.bundledIconTitle: Default icon from the game-icons.net pack (CC BY 3.0).
settings.updateAllQ: Update all addons to their latest version?
settings.restartMovedHint: The ♻ server restart lives in the Server tab.
settings.serverOpsHint: Restart the server process (the supervisor starts it again). This is also how server-side add-on code loads after an install or update.
settings.restartQ: Restart the server now? The page reconnects automatically once it's back.
settings.restarting: Restarting the server… the page will reconnect automatically.
settings.restartTimeout: The server is taking a while to come back. Reload the page manually if it doesn't return.
settings.restartHint: Restart the server to load the server-side changes.
settings.contentGroupsHint: Untick a group to hide its records everywhere — browse, links, dependent add-ons. Re-tick any time; nothing is deleted.
settings.conflictHint: Multiple add-ons want to change the same part. Pick which one wins — otherwise the built-in content is shown.
settings.deleteUsageHint: Deleting an item that is in use offers the option to replace it with another item or delete it anyway (missing references render with a ⚠ warning, nothing breaks).
settings.dmPasswordTooShort: DM password must be at least 4 characters
settings.downloadZipTitle: Downloads a ZIP of the whole data/ folder
settings.iconUploadHint: SVG / PNG / JPG / WebP, max 2 MB / file, 16 at once.
settings.idExists: ID '{id}' already exists — pick another or let it be generated
settings.logoUploadHint: Max 5 MB. Square PNG / SVG / WebP with a transparent background recommended, ideally at least 256×256 px.
settings.logoutConfirm: Log out? Editing again will require entering the password.
settings.logoutHint: Logging out ends the session and returns the page to public mode. Editing again will require entering the password.
settings.mapNoImage: This map has no image yet. Upload one below.
settings.mapUploadHint: Max 40 MB. Recommended format JPG/PNG/WebP, min. width 2000 px.
settings.mapUploadedRebuilding: Map uploaded — regenerating tiles in the background…
settings.mapViewsEmpty: No views yet. On the world map zoom/pan a view and click ✚ Save view (visible in edit mode).
settings.mapViewsHint: Create new views directly on the map: in edit mode zoom/pan to the desired view and click ✚ Save view in the toolbar.
settings.mapsTreeHint: The tree mirrors the place hierarchy — only those with an uploaded map are listed. To add a new sub-map, open the place and upload an image in its editor.
settings.markerZoomScaleHint: (0 = icons always keep the same size; 1 = they grow at the same rate as the map)
settings.noAddons: No add-ons yet — install your first from GitHub.
settings.noIconFiles: No files yet. Upload at least one — without uploaded icons the default emoji glyph is used.
settings.partyMembersHint: Membership is set in each character's editor — in the "Faction" dropdown choose Our party. Click a character below to edit.
settings.passwordDMOnly: Password change is available to the DM only.
settings.passwordsIntro: Set or change the password for both DM and player. A change requires the current DM password. The password is stored as a hash in data/auth.json and overrides the environment variable. New passwords immediately log out all other sessions of that role.
settings.pickReplacement: Choose what to replace it with
settings.playerPartyIntro: Visual identity of the player party — used in the faction dropdown in the character editor, on the dashboard, in the character list, and for the glow around PC portraits. Membership is governed by the Our party choice in a character's faction.
settings.playerPasswordTooShort: Player password must be at least 4 characters (or empty to disable)
settings.removeAddonQ: Remove add-on "{name}"? Its data will be kept in case of a reinstall.
settings.restoreFromBackupTitle: Upload a ZIP from Download ZIP or a JSON export for a full data restore
settings.restoreFromFileQ:
Restore data from the file "{name}"?

Current data will be overwritten. A safety backup point is created automatically before restoring, so the action can be undone.
settings.restoreSnapshotQ: Restore the state from {when}? Current data will be overwritten, but a safety backup point is created automatically before restoring.

settings.revertLastNQ.one: Revert the last {n} edit? A safety backup point is created automatically before restoring.
settings.revertLastNQ.other: Revert the last {n} edits? A safety backup point is created automatically before restoring.

settings.rollbackAddonQ: Roll add-on "{name}" back to the previous version?
settings.rollbackServerSuffix: — restart the server for the server part
settings.serverCodeWarn: Contains server code — it will run with full server privileges.
settings.serverRestartNote: Restart the server (container) to (un)load the server part.
settings.strategyRandomHint: One of the variants is chosen deterministically for each place.
settings.strategySingleHint: The first uploaded file is always rendered.
settings.uploadHintLocal: Saved as {path} and the server regenerates tiles in the background.
settings.uploadHintWorld: Saved as {path} and the server regenerates tiles in the background.
settings.viewAsPlayerTitle: Show the site as a player sees it
settings.wizardPasteHint: Paste a link to the add-on's GitHub repository (or owner/name).
settings.wizardPasteRepo: Paste a link to the repository.
sidebar.editorHint: Organize the left panel: drag pages between sections or into {hidden}, drag a section by its handle {grip} to reorder. A section can be renamed, given an icon, marked as collapsible or DM-only. Changes take effect immediately and are shared with everyone.
store.serverUnavailableIcons: Server is unavailable — can't upload icons.
store.serverUnavailableMap: Server is unavailable — can't upload the map.
store.serverUnavailablePortrait: Server is unavailable — can't upload the image.
timeline.title: Timeline
wiki.addPartyCharacterTitle: Add a new character to the party
wiki.artifactEmptyDesc: Objects of power — magic weapons, cursed jewels, lost relics.
wiki.charEmptyDesc: PCs, allies and enemies the party meets. Add the first character and start building the world.
wiki.charLittleKnown: We know very little about this character.
wiki.discardChangesConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Really discard your edits?
wiki.factionEmptyDesc: Organizations, guilds, armies — they define colors, ranks and characters' affiliations. Required for rank chains.
wiki.historyEmptyDesc: Events of ancient ages — wars, the fall of empires, the awakening of dragons. They flesh out the world independently of the campaign timeline.
wiki.lastSessionEmpty: There are no events with an assigned session yet. Add an event in the Timeline.
wiki.locEmptyDesc: Locations in the campaign — cities, dungeons, wilderness, spots on the map.
wiki.mysteryEmptyDesc: The campaign's open questions — what's unknown, what needs uncovering, what the party is investigating.
wiki.openQNoMatch: No open question matches the search.
wiki.openQSearchPlaceholder: Search in the question text or mystery name…
wiki.pantheonEmptyDesc: Gods, their domains, rituals and priests — the pantheon characters believe in, or don't.
wiki.partyEmptyDash: There's no PC yet. Add a character and assign it the Party faction.
wiki.partyEmptyDesc: Active player characters in the campaign. Add the first member — players, the band, PCs.
wiki.partyEmptyInline: The party is empty so far. Add the first member.
wiki.partyEmptyTitle: The party is empty so far
wiki.partyManagedVia: The player party is now managed via ⚙ Settings → Our party (appearance) and in each character's editor (membership).
wiki.petsEmptyDesc: Companions of the party, factions and individual characters. Add the first one — you can leave it without an owner and assign it later.
wiki.recentChangesEmpty: Nothing has been edited yet — recent changes to characters, locations, events and other records will show up here.
wiki.searchHint: Name, tags, type — more chips = all must match
